description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node Docker image and runs a before_script executing `node --version`, `npm --version`, and `npm ci || npm install` to set up the environment. Add a `pages` job (in the default stage) that runs `npm run make`, publishes the `public/` directory as a pages artifact, sets the deployment environment to Production with URL https://example-react-bootstrap.tripetto.com/, and is limited to the master branch. No caches, services, or additional variables are needed.
